description:
Post-finalization spec revision 2026-06-05 (bl-2e26 §16 + §7 binding consumers). Amends landed bl-d024 ('§16 base doctor', commit ec011ce), bl-0ec3 (delivery doctor hook), bl-f813/bl-3d75 (delivery plugin binding reads).

WHAT (src/doctor.rs + delivery plugin):
- Base doctor: replace 'operating/ resolves' audit with 'landing exists AND tasks_branch resolves to a valid tasks/ checkout'. Replace 'EffectiveConfig resolves — flag a trail-layer conflict' with 'landing config/balls.toml (+XDG) parses + field-sanity' (no trail layer left to conflict). config_resolution() no longer walks a trail.
- doctor repair-hints: 'store unresolved -> bl prime'; 'store stale -> bl sync' (was 'trail step stale').
- Delivery plugin + any binding consumer: read store/landing/tasks_branch from the §7 binding (was 'operating'). worktree_path still keys on binding.invocation_path (unchanged).
- Delivery change-worktree / squash targets unchanged (it operates on the PROJECT repo, not the balls store).

Note: tracker's own doctor hook (store-remote audit) is in the tracker task bl-cd21.
title: Greenfield §16 doctor + delivery binding consumers: audit tasks_branch/landing, drop operating//trail-layer checks
